text: Pair programming sessions improved code quality significantly
Daily standups were short and focused — under 15 minutes every day
We shipped the onboarding flow on time and under budget
Design reviews were earlier in the sprint — fewer last-minute changes
Team communication in Slack channels improved vs last sprint
Ticket estimates were consistently off — most took 2x longer than planned
Too many context switches — engineers were pulled into meetings mid-task
QA was bottlenecked in the last 2 days of the sprint
Unclear acceptance criteria on 4 of 12 tickets caused rework
We had no buffer for unexpected bugs from production
Add 10% buffer to all estimates next sprint
PM to write acceptance criteria before sprint planning — not during
Block 2 hours per engineer per day as focus time (no meetings)
QA to start testing on day 5, not day 8 of a 10-day sprint
